name: web-search
description: Searches the web via an in-cluster SearXNG instance and returns the top results. The SearXNG target is fixed via this tool's own configuration, never taken from the caller's input.
input: A single search query as a plain string.
output: A Markdown list of results (title, URL, and snippet) from SearXNG, or a failed event if the search could not be completed.
